review:
ISSUES:
- [severity:info] src/backend/services/rag_service.py:734 - The deterministic ID generation assumes `source`, `chunk_index`, and `content_hash` always exist in `doc.metadata`. If any are missing, indexing will fail with a `KeyError`.
- [severity:info] src/dashboard/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx:190 - The check `session.project_name !== '-'` provides good backward compatibility for existing data, while the backend change in `claude_session_monitor.py` ensures new non-project sessions return an empty string.

VERDICT: approve
SUMMARY: Correctly implements deterministic UUIDs for Qdrant compatibility and improves project context handling in both backend and frontend.
